'''Tybis''' were a beast of burden native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[J't'p'tan]]. They were known for having a gentle nature.<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

They could also be found in the [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>
